metadata.copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2011 Revision.
c_lines: Music: 'Duke Street' John Hatton, 1793.  Setting: "Christian Hymns", 1908.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2011 Revision.

1.raw_text: Jesus shall reign where'er the sun Does his successive journeys run; His kingdom stretch from shore to shore Till moons shall wax and wane no more.

2.raw_text: For Him shall endless prayer be made, And praises throng to crown His head; His Name, like sweet perfume shall rise With every morning sacrifice.

3.raw_text: People and realms of every tongue Dwell on His love with sweetest song; And infant voices shall proclaim Their early blessings on His Name.

4.raw_text: Blessings abound where'er He reigns; The prisoner leaps to lose his chains, The weary find eternal rest, And all the sons of want are blest.

5.raw_text: Where He displays His healing power Death and the curse are known no more; In Him the tribes of Adam boast More blessings than their father lost.
